name: shell-header
description: Console application header: brand with prefix, dropdown nav menus, global icon actions, hamburger, skip-to-content

meta.name: ShellHeader
meta.description: Console application header: brand with prefix, dropdown nav menus, global icon actions, hamburger, skip-to-content

props.name: brand
props.description: Brand: { prefix?, name, href? } or free-form node

props.name: nav
props.description: Top nav: links or dropdown menus ({ label, items })

props.name: actions
props.description: Right-aligned global icon actions with aria-pressed

props.name: end
props.description: Free-form trailing slot (user menu, theme switcher)

props.name: onMenuClick
props.description: Renders the hamburger button; call shell.toggleSideNav

props.name: skipToContentHref
props.description: Skip-link target; false disables the link

examples.title: Console header
examples.code:
<ShellHeader
  brand={{ prefix: 'cascade', name: 'Console', href: '/' }}
  nav={[
    { label: 'Dashboard', href: '/dash', active: true },
    { label: 'Manage', items: [{ label: 'Users', href: '/users' }] },
  ]}
  actions={[{ id: 'notifications', label: 'Notifications', icon: <Bell /> }]}
/>
examples.description: Brand with prefix, dropdown nav, global icon action
